stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 14, which statement about a vehicle towing an aircraft is correct?

options.a: Control of persons and vehicles at aerodromes is governed by ICAO Annex 11, section 3.8.
options.b: Such vehicles always have priority over taxiing traffic.
options.c: Emergency vehicles have permanent priority over all surface traffic.
options.d: They must maintain safe separation from landing and departing traffic.
